caption_en: Table S10. End-to-end traceability of every numerical claim and figure in the manuscript, from raw input file to final product. All script names listed below correspond to actual files in the project repository (Zenodo concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19821757). Where the analytical logic for a particular claim is distributed across multiple modules of modulo5_analisis.py, the relevant code section is indicated. Reproducibility seeds are documented inline. The 18 production scripts of the project are: extractor_anuarios.py, extractor_v2.py, extractor_v3.py, extractor_v4.py, generar_fig1.py, generar_tabla_estaciones_corregida.py, inspect_gpkg.py, modulo4_qc.py, modulo5_analisis.py, modulo6_figuras.py, modulo12_tablas_manuscrito.py, procesar_oni.py, regenerar_fig1.py, regenerar_fig4.py, regenerar_fig5.py, regenerar_fig6.py, regenerar_suplementarias.py, crear_resumen_word.js.

rows.Numerical claim: 14 of 16 independent ERA5-Land grid cells with significant warming; median Sen +0.0112 °C/yr
In-situ lapse rate −8.24 °C km⁻¹; bootstrap 95% CI [−10.9, −7.0]; n = 7
rows.Production script (actual project file): modulo5_analisis.py (lapse-rate OLS + bootstrap block, seed = 42, 1000 reps)

rows.Numerical claim: Lapse rate without M1240: −8.24 °C km⁻¹ (n = 6); difference 0.1 % from principal
rows.Raw input file: same as above with M1240 row excluded
rows.Production script (actual project file): modulo5_analisis.py (LOO sensitivity routine within lapse-rate block)

rows.Numerical claim: Rx1day Sen +0.49 mm/yr; R95p +4.17 mm/yr; CDD +0.21 days/yr (B1)
rows.Raw input file: CHIRPS_extremes_annual_by_band.csv (176 rows; computed via Google Earth Engine)
rows.Production script (actual project file): modulo5_analisis.py (extreme-indices MK-Sen block); GEE script archived as 06_gee/CHIRPS_extreme_indices.js in Zenodo

rows.Numerical claim: GEV 100-yr return level CIs: B1 142–225 mm; B2 78–121 mm; B3 63–84 mm; ALL 96–122 mm (Rx1day)
Spearman ρ negative at all 21 stations; median ρ = −0.23; lag-3 dominant at 17 stations
rows.Production script (actual project file): modulo5_analisis.py (ENSO Spearman block); ONI processing in procesar_oni.py

rows.Numerical claim: 463 of 588 ENSO multivariable correlations significant after FDR-BH at q = 0.05 (raw 465/588)
CMIP6 historical Sen median +0.021 to +0.024 °C/yr (Tmean) by band; 100% sign agreement
CMIP6 historical Tmax bias +5.4 to +12.8 °C; Tmin +8.8 to +16.6 °C (vs ERA5-Land)
rows.Final output: Manuscript Figure 6 (presented as diagnostic, not skill metric — see §4.4)

rows.Numerical claim: CMIP6 Tmean change 2041-2070: +1.09 to +2.11 °C across SSPs and bands
Hamed-Rao MMK applied as global sensitivity test; ETP loses 17 of 18 sig under MMK

rows.Production script (actual project file): modulo5_analisis.py (cross-validation block, Pearson + RMSE + MAE + bias)

rows.Numerical claim: 5 ERA5-Land grid cells host 2 stations each (10 of 21 stations); 16 independent pixels total
rows.Production script (actual project file): modulo5_analisis.py (pixel-collision identification block; rounds T_ERA5_2020-2025 mean to 4 decimals)
